options.name: -lower_bound
options.description: Lower range of type int, float, double

options.name: -object_type
options.description: Type of object on which property is to be defined. Types can be design, port, cell, pin, net, lib, lib_cell, lib_pin

options.name: -string_values
options.description: Values which can be given for type string

options.name: -type
options.description: Type of property. Type can be string, int, float, double, boolean

options.name: -upper_bound
options.description: Upper range of type int, float, double
